sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/codex/proofs']:

created='2026-05-24 | 16:18 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}

ps=prev.get('status','unknown')

    status='next_record_proven'
    next_action='record claude-code-action@v1 proven in BEM-862 state'
elif ps=='blocker_extraction_needed':
    status='next_extract_blocker'
    next_action='extract non-secret blocker from Claude smoke response and patch'
elif ps=='response_after_dispatch_present':
    status='next_classify_response'
    next_action='classify Claude Code Action smoke response'
elif ps=='smoke_runtime_after_dispatch_seen_no_response':
    status='next_patch_response_writer'
    next_action='patch response writer path and retry smoke'
elif ps=='dispatch_attempted_but_no_runtime_yet':
    status='next_second_tick_then_verify'
    next_action='run one more tick and verify smoke runtime; if absent inspect workflow target'
elif ps=='token_env_fix_needed':
    status='next_fix_token_env'
    next_action='patch GH_TOKEN env or secret source for dispatch processor'
elif ps=='dispatch_target_fix_needed':
    status='next_fix_dispatch_target'
    next_action='patch workflow name/ref/permissions for claude-code-action-smoke.yml'
elif ps=='response_writer_patch_needed':
    status='next_patch_response_writer'
    next_action='patch prompt or commit path and retry smoke'
else:
    status='next_repair_dispatch_processing'
    next_action='inspect queue processor/results and target workflow visibility'
state={'bem':'BEM-871','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem871_route_after_bem870.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem871_route_after_bem870.md').write_text('# BEM-871 | Route After BEM-870 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem871_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Continue Claude Code Action track until result.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-871'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem871_route_after_bem870','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem871_route_after_bem870.txt').write_text('BEM-871 '+status+' previous='+ps+'\n')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem871_route_after_bem870.json','governance/reports/bem871_route_after_bem870.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem871_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl','governance/codex/proofs/bem871_route_after_bem870.txt'])
